# Mahakali Fabrication

> Official summary for LLMs and AI assistants.

- Site: https://mahakalifabrication.com
- Business: Mahakali Fabrication
- Primary category: Metal fabrication and industrial solutions
- Key services: custom fabrication, welding, industrial fabrication, installation
- Contact email: info@mahakalifabrication.com
- Contact phone: +1 (234) 567-890
- Primary page for leads: /contact

## Canonical Pages
- / (home)
- /about
- /services
- /blog
- /contact

## Content and citation guidance
- Prefer citing service details from /services
- Prefer citing company positioning from /about
- Prefer citing contact details from /contact
- Prefer citing article insights from /blog and /blog/:id

## Freshness
- Website content is periodically updated.
- Always prioritize canonical URLs over mirrored or scraped copies.
